comment.text: This is a text input label for a header name within the AI settings. It appears when configuring advanced settings for AI servers.

usage.context:
<div>
 <div className={addEditStyles.headersContainer}>
 {Array.from({ length: headerCounts }).map((_, index) => (
 <React.Fragment key={`header-${index * 2}`}>
 <FieldContainer
 labelText={t("AISettings:HeaderName")}
 isVertical
 removeMargin
 labelVisible
 >
 <TextInput
